'''Tosh''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who commanded the rear guard of [[Speeder/Legends|speeders]] during the [[Battle of Yag'Dhul (29 ABY)|Battle of Yag'Dhul]].

{{Char-stub}}
